macro.title: Late April Is the Best Time to List a Home For Sale
macro.what: Aziz Sunderji, housing economist and founder of data visualization consultancy Home Economics, also provided data and analysis for this report
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

macro.title: Weekly pending home sales show yearly growth as mortgage rates fall
macro.what: Inventory rose to 743,006, new listings hit 77,919 and pending sales rose to 73,241 as rates neared 6.25%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: San Francisco Home Prices Jump Most in 8 Years Amid AI Boom
macro.what: The median sale price in the Bay Area metro rose 14% year over year in March, compared with a 1% gain nationwide
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Compass International Holdings takes 51% stake in Peerage Sotheby’s parent
housing.what: CIH disclosed a 51% stake in a Peerage-linked parent, including a 30-month repayment plan and a TPG cash put option.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Homebuyers Hold the Negotiating Power In 38 Major Metros, Up From 29 Last Year
housing.what: Nationally, sellers outnumber buyers by 43%—just shy of the largest gap in records dating back to 2013
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The GPS for equity: Building the industry’s first true navigation infrastructure
housing.what: As automation reshapes mortgage operations, the industry’s next challenge is to help borrowers navigate the complex decisions that shape their lives—not just to close the loan faster
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Home inspection trends reshaping the 2026 housing market
housing.what: The home inspection industry is undergoing a quiet shift that directly impacts mortgage origination timelines, closing procedures, and lender risk assessment
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: U.S. Homeowners Are Remodeling Instead of Relocating
housing.what: About two-thirds of homeowners who recently made renovations chose to upgrade their home instead of moving to a new place, per a recent Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: This Spring’s Housing Market Is Unseasonably Slow As Iran War, High Costs Curb Demand
housing.what: Pending home sales are declining and touring activity is slumping
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Redfin Calls on NWMLS to Give Home Sellers More Choice

notables.title: Colorado AG voids MV Realty Homeowner Benefit Agreements
notables.what: Colorado AG reached a consent judgment voiding MV Realty 40-year contracts, clearing title filings, and stopping about $8.4 million in fees.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: KBW: Window for Fannie, Freddie privatization is narrowing
notables.what: KBW says Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac privatization is unlikely before the November 2026 midterms, resulting in lower stock price targets.
notables.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
notables.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Why real estate brokerages are turning marketing into a growth engine
notables.what: Brokerages are shifting marketing into a growth role tied to recruitment, adoption and revenue, with research citing 1.4x growth.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Miami and RWorld Realtors merge into 93,000 member association
notables.what: MIAMI and RWorld will merge May 11, 2026, uniting 93,000 members and targeting a combined MLS that could rank third in the U.S.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: HomeServices is changing its playbook, here’s what CEO Chris Kelly says
notables.what: HomeServices CEO Chris Kelly warns listing fragmentation could hurt consumers, and says MLSs may evolve into technology providers.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Eric Manley on how Atlantic Avenue became the No. 1 reverse broker in less than 4 years
notables.what: Atlantic Avenue led 2025 HECM endorsements, grew to 70 staff members and reported $90 million in Q1 2026 volume amid proprietary loan growth.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
